Name: Artemyn
Description:

Name: Magris Talc
Description:
Magris Talc is the leading fully integrated North American Talc producer with a 100+ year operating history. Our products are used globally by leading, blue-chip organizations, to enhance performance in a variety of industrial applications in key markets including polymers, paints & coatings, pharmaceutical, building products and more.

Leading Supplier of Critical Inputs:
We are the leading supplier of talc products in North America. Our products increase performance, reduce weight, control emissions and displace harmful chemicals in a variety of industries including automotive, building products, agriculture, pharmaceutical and more. 

Continuous Innovation:
We understand the complex demands of customers. Our research & development experts help develop solutions by designing new products, technologies & processes. 

Health, Safety & Environmental:
Safety is our most important value, and we believe that everyone should go home safe & healthy everyday. At Magris Talc, we utilize best in class safety management programs which help us to target continuous improvement in our safety performance & culture.

Approach to Sustainability:
We define the performance of our organization based on a strong health & safety leadership & culture, and on industry-best environmental practices. We also prioritize building and maintaining relationships with the communities that are critical to sustain our mission. We operate responsibly, respecting our employees, communities, and the environment. Across our operations, we ensure that we enhance everyday lives, and communities at large, to create a lower carbon world.  We continuously invest in technologies that reduce our overall footprint, and in communities that help sustain our mission.

Community:

Magris’s core values are rooted in the relationships we strive to build with our communities. We define these communities to include our employees, contractors, suppliers, local communities, & others who may be impacted by our activities

Name: Nordic Bio-Graphite
Description: Nordic Bio-Graphite is an early-stage company emerging from cutting-edge research, now transitioning toward its first pilot plant to evaluate graphite with clients. We aim to help industries transition toward a net-zero future by supplying CO2-neutral graphite. Graphite is the largest component in EV batteries and a critical material for green steel production. However, traditional production methods emit up to 20 kg of CO2 per kg of graphite. Based on a patent-pending solution from research at KTH Sweden, we have developed the first process to produce fossil-free graphite from bio-based materials at scale.

Name: Panyam Cements and Mineral Industries Ltd
Description:
Panyam Cements and Mineral Industries Ltd is a renowned cement manufacturing company with a rich history spanning over six decades. Established in 1955, Panyam Cements has grown to become one of the leading cement plants in the region, known for its commitment to quality, strength, and durability. As a state-of-the-art cement plant, we have a production capacity of 0.8 million tons per annum (MTPA). 

We prioritize the quality of our cement and aim to exceed the expectations of our customers. Through advanced manufacturing processes and stringent quality control measures, we consistently produce cement of exceptional strength, durability, and reliability. 

Panyam Cements recognizes that its success is a result of the dedicated efforts of its employees. Our team comprises skilled professionals who bring their expertise and passion to every aspect of our operations. We foster a culture of continuous learning and development, encouraging our employees to stay abreast of industry advancements and best practices. By investing in our people, we create a motivated workforce that is capable of delivering excellence at every level.


As a responsible corporate citizen, Panyam Cements is actively involved in various community initiatives and social development programs. We believe in giving back to society and aim to make a positive impact on the lives of the people living in the areas surrounding our plant. Through education, healthcare, infrastructure development, and other welfare initiatives, we strive to contribute to the holistic development of the communities we serve.

Panyam Cements and Mineral Industries Ltd has a rich legacy built on a strong foundation of quality, sustainability, and community engagement. With a steadfast commitment to excellence and a vision for the future, we continue to play a significant role in shaping the infrastructure and construction landscape while upholding our core values of integrity, reliability, and customer satisfaction.

Name: Grupo Minero San Carlos
Description:
¿Quiénes somos?

GMSC cuenta más de 20 años de experiencia, ofrece a la Industria y a los centros de distribución las soluciones de empaque de tarimas, más eficientes, seguras y económicas del mercado. 

Además, creamos productos de alta calidad y económicamente accesibles para fomentar la convivencia limpia, armónica y saludable entre las familias mexicanas y sus mascotas (www.happycat.mx).

En los últimos años hemos desarrollado Soluciones Ecológicas Rentables bajo nuestra marca llamada Zeolutions (www.zeolutions.mx).
____
¿Cómo lo construimos?

Identificamos tus necesidades | Edificamos planes a la medida | Capacitación constante | Evaluaciones y/o Auditorias constantes | Análisis de resultados.
____
Nuestros productos:

GMSC Empaques cuenta con las películas con la más alta calidad (fuerte, fácil de usar y ahorro económico y de plástico) en el mercado. Debido a los altos estándares utilizados en la fabricación de nuestras películas podemos comprometernos a disminuir tus costos de empaque, siempre manteniendo la seguridad de tu carga desde que deja tu almacén hasta que llega al destino final. El impacto del uso de plástico está deteriorando el planeta, con nuestra película ahorras hasta un 50% de desperdicio.

Happy Cat cuenta con más de 12 años en el mercado de las Arenas Aglutinantes para Gato, respaldan nuestra experiencia, fabricada a base de un mineral no metálico con un gran poder de absorción.

Zeolutions es nuestra tecnología en soluciones amigables con el medio ambiente para el cuidado del agua, incremento de la productividad en la agricultura, disminución de la emisión de CO2 y metano en el medio ambiente, recuperación de suelos y mejoramiento de la salud humana y animal.

Name: Thesaur Quantum Minerals AG
Description:
A Tangible Asset for a Digital Age
Thesaur offers a unique opportunity to invest in a foundational physical asset, de-risked by a 50 million ton high-grade silica deposit, out of which 31.2 million tons are verified, audited reserves.

Investor Participation Options
Equity Participation Option
Gain direct equity in Thesaur, with shareholder rights under EU law, governance rights, and full dividend income from industrial profits.

Usufruct (Use-of-Fruits) Option
For those seeking high yield without equity complexity, this option grants the same financial benefits (profit sharing) without holding shares, fully recognized under the Romanian Civil Code.

Risk Mitigation & Investor Protection
Asset-Backed Security & Offtake Agreements
Equity investments benefit from an Asset Guarantee, with assets pledged at the invested amount. Plus, MoUs worth over €200M annually are in place with a major European-Chinese photovoltaic manufacturer.

Profitable Worst-Case Scenario
Even raw, unprocessed silica sales would generate ~$30M annual revenue (ROI < 2 years), ensuring downside security and priority reimbursement of capital.

Governance & Future Participation Rights
Investors may appoint a Non-Executive Director, with voting rights and anti-dilution protection. Early investors also gain preferential rights to future ventures like Thesaur City.

Investor Benefit Streams
Regardless of the participation option, investors gain access to a triple-yield structure.
Industrial Profit Share
Receive equity-tied dividends or usufruct benefit distributions from industrial operations, with a cumulative ROI of 971% in 5 years and 13,752% in 33 years.

Token Capital Gains
Exposure to eSand’s exponential upside potential (25x–33x from $30 to $800–$1,000) in the short term, and up to 323x modeled long-term.

Token Ecosystem Rewards
Passive annual income rewards (7.5%–15% range) from eSand token operations like value stabilization and buy-back strategies.

Name: BURAS Mining
Description:
Welcome to Buras Mining: Your Premier Source for Industrial Minerals

1. Calcium Bentonite:
- Properties: Highly absorbent clay primarily composed of montmorillonite.
- Uses: Ideal for health and beauty products due to detox properties, pet litter, oil and grease absorption, and as a foundry binder.

2. Zeolite:
- Properties: Microporous, aluminosilicate mineral known for selective adsorption.
- Uses: Crucial for water purification, agricultural feed additives, odor control, and enhancing soil nutrients in horticulture.

3. Trass:
- Properties: Volcanic ash with excellent hydraulic properties when combined with lime.
- Uses: Enhances strength and durability of pozzolanic cement, suitable for historic restorations and modern constructions.

4. Perlite:
- Properties: Volcanic glass that expands upon heating, lightweight and insulating.
- Uses: Used in soilless horticultural mixes, as insulation in construction, and for high-temperature industrial applications.

Tailored Solutions:
Buras Mining also offers customized mineral solutions to match specific industry requirements. Our advanced processing capabilities allow us to modify the physical and chemical properties of our minerals to meet unique customer needs.

Our Focus
We operate at the nanoscale, where one nanometer (nm) equals one-billionth of a meter (10⁻⁹ m). This scale is ideal for working with molecules and nanoparticles. 
Our products are designed for bulk nanomaterial applications, without atomic-level manipulation.

Documentation includes:

Exclusivity & Trust

Name: Piedras Naturales Martínez
Description:
Desde nuestros antepasados la piedra natural ha sido un material imprescindible para la construcción. Con el paso de los años se han ido introduciendo nuevos materiales que han intentado imitar a nuestra madre naturaleza, pero sin conseguirlo.

La piedra natural posee unas virtudes que ningún otro material puede compararse. Es un perfecto aislante de humedades, frío y calor; ya que las viviendas construidas en piedra natural conservan prácticamente en su interior a lo largo del año la misma temperatura.

En los últimos años ha aumentado la demanda de piedra natural por la decoración y estética que provocan estos materiales, llegando a presentar hoy en día una amplia gama de tonalidades y texturas.

Existe la posibilidad, en la gran mayoría de nuestras piedras irregulares, de elaborarlas en mayores grosores de los indicados en cada referencia, ya que contamos con producción propia.

Our products

- Moca Cream

Moca Gray, sourced from the same quarry as Moca Cream, features a versatile structure suitable for both interior and exterior use. This shared origin and adaptability make it a versatile choice for various applications.

Moca Gray Porous undergoes unique processing techniques, which give it an anti-slip structure. This distinctive feature makes it particularly suitable for use in both flooring and pool areas.

Name: Porto de Areia Jomane
Description:
AREIA FINA:
Utilização: Usada principalmente em acabamentos e revestimentos. Ocasiões de Uso: Preparo de massa fina para acabamento em paredes, assentamento de azulejos e pisos cerâmicos.
Exemplo de Aplicação: Revestimento de fachadas, assentamento de porcelanatos.

AREIA MÉDIA:
Utilização: Ideal para construção civil, especialmente para fazer argamassas e concretos.
Ocasiões de Uso: Fundações de edifícios, assentamento de blocos, preparo de reboco, entre outros. Exemplo de Aplicação: Construção de muros, lajes, e bases para pisos.

AREIA GROSSA:
Utilização: Indicada para obras que demandam maior resistência. Ocasiões de Uso: Preparo de concretos mais robustos, como vigas e pilares.
Exemplo de Aplicação: Estruturas de concreto armado, bases para pavimentos industriais.

PEDRISCO:
Como tem dimensões pequenas, é muito utilizado na produção de vigas e vigotas, lajes pré-moldadas, blocos de concreto para construção, fundação, intertravados, tubos, blocos, bloquetes, paralelepípedos de concretos, chapiscos e acabamentos em geral.

BRITA 1⁄2:
É a pedra mais usada para a confecção do concreto das colunas de construções o que exige grande qualidade e resistência. E também é usada para fazer vigas e lajes. Muitos a usam também para forrar o quintal, sem a necessidade de fazer calçada.

BRITA 1:
É praticamente o dobro do tamanho do pedrisco, por isso é a queridinha das construtoras em processos de obras de grande porte, como prédios, pontes e espaços comerciais, já que é ideal para a fabricação de concreto para colunas, vigas e lajes.

BRITA 2:
É a mais recomendada quando há necessidade de um concreto extremamente resistente para construções que precisam suportar mais peso. Ela é um dos componentes do concreto bruto e faz parte das fundações e dos pisos de maior espessura. Por conta de sua versatilidade, pedriscos e britas, vão além da construção civil:
Servem para compor pátios com estacionamento;
Decoração de jardim e, até mesmo, projetos interiores de paisagismo;

Nuestras concesiones de exploración cubren un área de 2.700 hectáreas, con óptimas condiciones para la extracción de litio.

El proyecto se presenta como una opción viable para explorar litio a partir de 2024, cuando se realicen las licitaciones en Chile. Contamos con ventajas comparativas, como la cobertura total del Salar y la ausencia de restricciones ambientales o comunidades indígenas cercanas.

Nuestro equipo incluye expertos en propiedad minera, geología e ingeniería, y estamos preparados para aprovechar esta oportunidad en el mercado del litio.

Name: Goudvoordeel.nl
Description:
Goud kopen met korting, hoe is dat mogelijk?
Het delven van goud is een kostbaar proces. Er is veel geld nodig voor de financiering van de machines en het personeel om gevonden goud ook daadwerkelijk uit de grond te kunnen halen. En hoe meer machines en personeel, hoe sneller en meer productie er kan worden gedraaid.

Een vaak gebruikte financieringsmogelijkheid die hiervoor wordt ingezet is de zogenaamde "Forward Gold Sale": goud wordt op voorhand verkocht om zo de middelen te verkrijgen om het uit de grond te kunnen halen en uit te leveren. Zie het als voorfinanciering waarbij u wordt beloond met een aanzienlijke korting op het fysieke goud.

Name: Akku Minerals Oy
Description:
Clean energy minerals will play a crucial role in the energy transition. The production of minerals, such as graphite, lithium and cobalt, will need to increase by nearly 500% by 2050, to meet the growing demand for clean energy technologies. The World Bank estimates that over 3 billion tons of minerals and metals will be needed to deploy wind, solar and geothermal power, as well as energy storage, required for achieving a below 2°C future.



In Europe, we face a critical shortage of securing clean energy minerals. So much so that the energy transition could be at risk. The pandemic and Russia’s attack on Ukraine also highlight the concentration risk in supply chains and Europe’s dependence on imports.

   

Akku Minerals Oy was set up to address this problem by searching for high-quality clean energy minerals for the EU that can be explored, extracted and processed sustainably. Akku is looking to identify resources for small-footprint, low emission underground mining, which can be carried out applying zero-waste practices and circular economy principles to minimise impact.

Name: New Economy Minerals Jobs
Description:
New Economy Minerals are a category of minerals that are considered vital in the development of emerging technologies that contribute towards renewable energy production and storage. Investment in renewable energy is growing and within the Australian resources sector there is an opportunity to supply a pipeline of mineral products that can support this growth. Examples of New Economy Minerals include; lithium, copper, phosphate, nickel, cobalt and “rare earth elements” neodymium, dysprosium and praseodymium.

The availability of these mineral resources allows Australia to play a vital role in supporting the world's transition towards a more sustainable and environmentally friendly future.

If you want to be part of this future, search for jobs or register as an Employer, Project or Precinct on New Economy Minerals Jobs today.

> For Employers Projects & Precincts

New Economy Minerals is a dedicated platform for employers, projects or precincts who supply vital minerals that support the world’s move towards Net Zero Emissions.

As a member of New Economy Minerals, you can:

Choose the plan that is right for your hiring needs and advertise your jobs to registered job seekers.
Promote your business via an Employer, Project or Precinct Profile, allowing you to stand out in this competitive job market.
Use New Economy Mineral’s AI technology to search, smart match and talent pool job seekers via its AirCV functionality.
Execute the more “traditional” job search processes such as printing a Job Poster and post jobs to your social media accounts.

Find out more at https://www.neweconomymineralsjobs.com.au/p/products-and-pricing

Name: Austone Pebbles
Description:
Operating since 1974, Austone was established on a site previously used for Rutile mining, located at Macksville, which is halfway between Sydney and Brisbane on the NSW north coast.

Allan Russell the founder and principal, identified a market for Quartz pebbles that had specific characteristics including hardness, being well rounded and in a variety of sizes that exhibited the highly regarded “Nambucca Gold” colour.

The Nambucca pebble deposit was derived from the wave erosion of a conglomerate formation exposed on the sea floor millions of years ago. As erosion released the pebbles over time, they were moved to shore in the prevailing ocean current. The effects of this erosion and movement over a very long period, gives the pebbles their characteristics.

To prepare the pebbles for sale in commercial quantities, they needed to be ‘graded’ into a variety of sizes, so to achieve this, specific processing equipment was designed and built at the Austone plant that both grades and washes the pebbles to provide clean ready to use product.

The initial demand for small pebbles for use in paving, soon expanded into wider applications and our sands and pebbles are now sold throughout Australia into a diverse range of applications including Aquariums, Landscape, Swimming pools, Paving, Mineral Processing, Water Filtration and more.

Many well-known sites with large public spaces have used our Austone pebbles, including Brisbane Arts Centre and Sydney Observatory.

Austone remains an Australian owned family company, our dedicated team constantly strive to meet the growing demand for our products while also caring for the local environment in which we operate.

Name: Lydford Mining Company
Description:
Operating out of Golden Grove, St Ann, Lydford has seeks to develop a world-class limestone industry in Jamaica. We made history in late 2018 as the first exporter of manufactured limestone sand to the US Virgin Islands. The shipment of 4,800 tons of construction-grade limestone sand was a first for Jamaica. Through key partnerships, at home and abroad, coupled with a focus on sustainable mining practices, we continue to grow the capacity of our facilities to meet today’s demand for products locally and internationally.

Our History
In 1992, Dr. Vincent Hill and Mr. Leo Cousins set out on a mission to develop a world-class limestone industry in Jamaica. They envisioned the transformation of limestone from a low-value construction material into a highly profitable product through processing. Beginning with exporting high-purity calcium carbonate for use in the food and pharmaceutical markets, they achieved sustainable development by integrating a wide range of uses of limestone into their operations. Vincent, a geochemist, combined his skills and resources with Leo, a mechanical engineer. This synergistic relationship made their vision of developing this fledgling industry a reality. That vision turned into profit and the Lydford Mining Company, which started with strictly high purity whiting grade calcium carbonate, evolved over the years to provide milled products, high-value screened products, construction-grade aggregates and concrete products.

Name: Minacal
Description:
VISÃO GERAL

Fundada em 1997, a Minacal é uma empresa familiar cujas raízes se entrelaçam com a própria história do desenvolvimento agrícola no Alto Parnaíba Piauiense. Nascemos do campo e para o campo. Essa origem define nosso compromisso: compreender com precisão as necessidades de nossos clientes.

Atuamos no fornecimento de corretivo de acidez de solo para culturas anuais. Para isso, contamos com uma equipe especializada, recursos de alto rendimento e rigoroso controle de qualidade.

O calcário homogêneo e de elevada reatividade, extraído criteriosamente e entregue no chão da fazenda, é uma etapa fundamental do calendário agrícola, essencial para a alta produtividade das culturas na região.

QUALIDADE COM PROPÓSITO

A construção de um solo fértil requer, sobretudo, um corretivo uniforme, com teores constantes e granulometria fina, atuando não apenas como agente neutralizante, mas também como base de integridade química e estrutural, refletidas diretamente na produtividade da safra.

• Extração criteriosa na lavra
• Consistência na soma das bases (Cálcio e Magnésio)
• Granulometria monitorada (mínimo duas vezes ao dia)
• Garantia real com base em critério de qualidade final (PRNT)

MAIS QUE LABORATÓRIO, LAVOURA

Para nós, qualidade não se comprova apenas em laudo técnico. O Piauí obteve o maior crescimento relativo no plantio de soja do Brasil nos últimos 10 anos, resultado que reforça nossa visão: a excelência do produto se confirma na escala e na dinâmica da operação agrícola. 

Mantemos expedição planejada e logística parceira. Informação e inteligência são, para nós, ferramentas para garantir que o insumo chegue no tempo certo e no volume acordado, atendendo com a mesma eficiência as maiores e menores demandas.

• Atendimento em qualquer escala
• Expedição planejada
• Logística parceira

NOSSA RAZÃO DE EXISTIR

Nosso objetivo é a vontade de cada produtor: um plantio impecável e uma colheita vibrante ano após ano.

Name: Lubuskie Kruszywa
Description:
We extract and produce construction aggregates that comply with Polish and European standards.

Tarnawa mine owned by Lubuskie Kruszywa Sp. z o. o., is located in the province. Lubuskie Voivodeship. The mining activity on the Tarnawa Krośnieńska deposit began in 1992. The main activity of the company is the extraction of minerals from deposits and the production of aggregates. The aggregates produced come from homogeneous, natural deposits, which guarantees the consistency of the recipes. Thanks to numerous modernizations of the processing plant, the Tarnawa mine offers its customers aggregates of good quality and diverse assortment:
- Sands meeting the following standards: PN-EN 12620, PN-EN 13043, PN-EN 13242 and PN-EN 13139
- Gravel meeting the following standards: PN-EN 12620, PN-EN 13043, PN-EN 13242 and PN-EN 13139
- Mixtures meeting the following standards: PN-EN 12620, PN-EN 13043 and PN-EN 13242

Our aggregates have high physical and mechanical parameters that make them suitable for use in:
- production of ready-mixed concretes, paving stones, mineral and asphalt masses,
- road foundations,
- land exchange,
- ballast,
- and other works.

Our main goals are:
- partnership and flexible cooperation with clients,
- respect and protection of the natural environment,
- rational use of mining areas,
- high level of safety and working conditions.

Name: Kaolin EAD, a company of Quarzwerke Group
Description:
Kaolin EAD is a leading producer of industrial minerals in Southeast Europe with more than 100 years of history, expertise, and innovation. The company specializes in the extraction, processing and supply of high-quality mineral raw materials essential for a wide range of industries, including ceramics, glass, foundry, paper, construction materials, chemicals, filtration, plastics and polymers.

With multiple mines and modern processing facilities across Bulgaria, Kaolin manages the entire value chain — from geological exploration and sustainable mining to technologically advanced processing and precise quality control. The company’s portfolio includes kaolin, silica sand, feldspar, limestone, dolomite, quartz and specialized mineral products tailored to the needs of global industrial partners.

Kaolin continuously invests in modern technologies such as optical sorting, hydro-classification, energy-efficient equipment and automated laboratory systems to ensure reliable supply, consistent product quality and compliance with the highest industry standards. Each production process is supported by rigorous testing and in-house R&D, enabling the development of mineral solutions for more than 50 industrial applications.

Sustainability is a core commitment for Kaolin. The company applies responsible mining practices, implements land recultivation programs, reduces emissions and water consumption, and works actively to minimize its environmental footprint while ensuring long-term resource availability.

As a trusted supplier in the region and internationally, Kaolin continues to expand its capabilities, strengthen its partnerships and provide industries with the mineral solutions that support modern manufacturing and infrastructure.

Kaolin — over a century of reliability, innovation and excellence in industrial minerals.

Name: BORON2022
Description:
Değerli Araştırmacılar ve Katılımcılar,

Sizleri 05-07 Ekim 2022 tarihleri arasında Türkiye Enerji, Nükleer ve Maden Araştırma Kurumu Bor Araştırma Enstitüsü (TENMAK BOREN) tarafından Eti Maden İşletmeleri Genel Müdürlüğü ve İstanbul Teknik Üniversitesi iş birliğinde, İstanbul’da yüz yüze düzenlenecek olan Uluslararası Bor Sempozyumu’na (BORON 2022) davet etmekten mutluluk duyuyoruz.

BORON 2022’nin ana hedefi, endüstrinin birçok farklı alanında kullanılan borun, her yıl artan Ar-Ge ve Ür-Ge faaliyetlerini ve stratejik kullanım alanlarını tartışmaktır. Bu kapsamda ulusal ve uluslararası bilim camiasında bor konusunda uzman 20’den fazla davetli konuşmacı ile kamu ve özel sektör araştırma kurumlarının temsilcilerinin katılacağı BORON 2022’de araştırmacılar, bilim insanları ve uzmanlar tarafından yürütülen bor temelli Ar-Ge ve Ür-Ge çalışmaları, borun genel ve stratejik kullanım alanlarına yönelik yürütülen faaliyetler, bor endüstrisinde gelinen nihai durum ve gelecek projeksiyonları Türkçe ve İngilizce olarak tartışılacak, bor ile ilgili üretim yapan firmalar ürün ve faaliyetlerini sempozyum süresince fuaye alanında sergileyeceklerdir.

Dünya bor rezervlerinin %73’üne sahip Türkiye’de “Geleceği Bor İle Tasarlamak İçin Bor Ülkesinde Buluşalım” mottosuyla 05-07 Ekim 2022 tarihlerinde İstanbul’da buluşmak dileği ile.

Name: High Divide Minerals
Description:
High Divide Minerals is a privately held mining company headquartered in Dillon, Montana, specializing in the exploration, development, and production of high-quality talc. We are the only talc supplier that sources and processes 100% of its product in the United States, ensuring unmatched quality, supply security, and performance for our customers.

With more than 80 years of history through our predecessor business, High Divide is building on its legacy with a new chapter of growth. We’re investing in people, ore resources, and processing capabilities to better serve a wide range of industries—including personal care, plastics, coatings, ceramics, and agriculture.

Our strategy centers on long-term ore security and mine development. Projects such as the Treasure Island Mine Expansion and the Smith Dillon Mine Development, which offers line-of-sight to 20 years of supply, underscore our commitment to securing reliable access to premium talc, including our Talcron grades.

At High Divide Minerals, we combine deep geological expertise with a focus on sustainable practices, operational excellence, and community partnerships. Our mission is simple: deliver consistent, high-quality products while fostering strong, long-term relationships with our customers, partners, and the communities where we operate.

During the last 40 years, RCS has been supplying its customers with some of the richest reserves of calcium carbonate. Currently, the quarry itself holds an additional 100 years of reserves. Our products meet INDOT requirements and are of the highest quality in the industry.

Name: Simbio  /  REFCYCLE
Description:
Çelik, Çimento, Cam, Kireç, Seramik ve Demir Dışı Metal sektörlerinde açığa çıkan atık Refrakterlerin ve diğer minerallerin geri kazanımı gerçekleştiriyoruz. 
	Refrakter sektörü DÖNGÜSEL EKONOMİ uygulamalarında döngüyü kapatan firmayız.
	Sektörde ENDÜSTRİYEL SİMBİYOZ’un başlatılması için ihtiyaç duyulan Ar-Ge hizmetini veren ve alışverişte süreci yürüten çözüm ortağı bir firmayız. 
	Mineral bazlı atıkları nitelik ve nicelik bakımından sürdürülebilirliği olan MSDS ler ile tanımlanmış ikincil hammaddelere ve ürünlere dönüştürüyoruz. 
	CBAM’a maruz kalan sektörlerin Karbon ayak izlerinin düşürülmesine katkı veriyoruz.

Name: Jaro S.A.
Description:
Dostarczamy wysokiej jakości surowce mineralne i ogniotrwałe dla przemysłu. Dysponujemy własną kopalnią glin ogniotrwałych oraz nowoczesnym zakładem przetwórczym w Jaroszowie. Nasze produkty znajdują zastosowanie w branży materiałów ogniotrwałych, ceramice i budownictwie.

Łączymy tradycję z innowacją, gwarantując jakość, niezawodność i partnerskie podejście do Klienta.

Name: AnorTech Inc.
Description:
AnorTech is a Canadian based technology company focused on the development of game changing green technologies made from anorthosite (aluminum calcium silicate) rock. The company is focused on three global markets: green alumina, CO2 free cement and concrete thermal energy storage systems.

AnorTech has over 10 years experience in anorthosite R&D and marketing. The Company owns 100% of the Gronne Bjerg Anorthosite project in Greenland, which is on open tide water near the capital of Nuuk.

Name: Industrias Vasar
Description:
Industrias Vasar S.A.S. is a benchmark in the mining sector, processing, chemical transformation, and marketing of minerals, offering innovative and specialized solutions for various industries. Based in Bogotá, with a production plant in Sogamoso, Boyacá, we cover an area of 20,000 m² that includes modern facilities, our own quality control laboratory, and a commitment to excellence and environmental sustainability.

Innovation and Quality
Our offerings include products designed for the petroleum industry, water treatment, as well as refractoriness concretes and mortars. Additionally, we have recently expanded our range with a new line of animal nutrition, ensuring high-quality products that meet the specific needs of our clients. All of this is done under strict quality standards that comply with national and international regulations, including ecological agriculture regulations.
